label: Wheeltop EDS
description: Connect to Wheeltop EDS wireless electronic groupsets via BLE. Display gear information, battery levels, shift counts, and drivetrain visuals on your Karoo. Toggle Race Mode from the ride screen.
releaseNotes:
* Initial release
* BLE connection to Wheeltop EDS devices
* FD and RD battery percentage display
* Gear position and drivetrain visual
* Race mode toggle
* Shift counting
* Signal strength monitoring
